policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-adb-r02 - Deny using Standard and Trial pricing tier'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Databricks#IncidentremediationDatabricks#drcp-adb-r02 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Azure Databricks workspaces should be Premium SKU
policyDefinition.description: Only allow Databricks workspaces with the Premium SKU so that it supports features like Private Link and customer-managed keys for encryption.

drcp.name: DatabricksSupportedSKUs
drcp.controlDesc: Deny using Standard and Trial pricing tier

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
Array of SKU's that are allowed in this policy.
